— 2〉 m. n.
a〉 Milchspeise, insbes. in Milch gekochter Reis  AK. 2,7,23 .  H. 406 . an. 3,751 .  MED. s. 27 .  HALĀY. 2,165 .  GOBH. 4,7,19 .  ĀŚV. results.rendered_html:
pāyasa a. (sī f.) [payaso vikāraḥ aṇ] Made of water or milk.
— saḥ, -saṃ
1 Rice boiled in milk;  Ms. 3. 271 , 5. 7 ;  Y. 1. 173. 
2 Turpentine.
3 An oblation of milk, rice,
(pb) and sugar.
— saṃ
1 Milk.
2 Ambrosia, nectar.
